replies.msg:
以上個Method係適合用喺Within same class

如果你想其他CLASS都用到 你要用一個concept叫inherit

class Parent: 

  

    # constructor of Parent class 

    def __init__(self): 

        # Initialization of the Strings 

        self.String1 ="Hello"

        self.String2 ="World"

  

    def Function2(self): 

        print("Function2 : ", self.String1) 

        return

  
# Child class is inheriting from Parent class 

class Child(Parent): 

  

    def Function1(self): 

        # calling Function2 Method in parent class  

        self.Function2() 

        print("Function1 : ", self.String2) 

        return   

  
### Instance of Parent class 

Object1 = Parent() 

  
### Instance of Child class 

Object2 = Child() 

  
# Calling Function1 using Child class instance 
Object2.Function1()

以上個Method係適合用喺Within same class

如果你想其他CLASS都用到 你要用一個concept叫inherit

class Parent: 

  

    # constructor of Parent class 

    def __init__(self): 

        # Initialization of the Strings 

        self.String1 ="Hello"

        self.String2 ="World"

  

    def Function2(self): 

        print("Function2 : ", self.String1) 

        return

  
# Child class is inheriting from Parent class 

class Child(Parent): 

  

    def Function1(self): 

        # calling Function2 Method in parent class  

        self.Function2() 

        print("Function1 : ", self.String2) 

        return   

  
### Instance of Parent class 

Object1 = Parent() 

  
### Instance of Child class 

Object2 = Child() 

  
# Calling Function1 using Child class instance 
Object2.Function1()
